title: Cheesy Glamorgan Bake
description: A savoury baked dish made with leeks, mature cheddar, breadcrumbs, herbs and mustard, bound with egg and milk.
steps: Fry the leeks in the butter for about 5 minutes until soft.
Place the breadcrumbs in a bowl. Add the cooked leeks, grated cheddar, fresh herbs, salt and pepper.
Mix the eggs, milk and Dijon mustard together, then pour over the breadcrumb mixture. Mix until all the liquid is absorbed.
Tip into a baking dish approximately 25cm wide and 2–3cm deep. Press the mixture down with the back of a spoon.
Sprinkle extra cheddar over the top.
Leave to cool slightly to firm up before serving.
